mapper.sql: repository_id, branch, target_commit_hash, generation, status, credential_user_id, trace_id, last_error, initialized_at, created_at, updated_at
repository_id, linux_server_id, generation, status, branch, current_commit_hash, retry_count, next_retry_at, lease_token, lease_until, last_error, synced_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from reference_repository_replicas where repository_id = #{repositoryId} order by linux_server_id
mapper.insert: merge into reference_repository_states as target using (values ( #{row.repositoryId}, #{row.branch}, #{row.targetCommitHash}, #{row.generation}, #{row.status}, #{row.credentialUserId}, #{row.traceId}, #{row.lastError}, cast(#{row.initializedAt} as timestamp), cast(#{row.createdAt} as timestamp), cast(#{row.updatedAt} as timestamp) )) as source( repository_id, branch, target_commit_hash, generation, status, credential_user_id, trace_id, last_error, initialized_at, created_at, updated_at ) on target.repository_id = source.repository_id when not matched then insert ( repository_id, branch, target_commit_hash, generation, status, credential_user_id, trace_id, last_error, initialized_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( source.repository_id, source.branch, source.target_commit_hash, source.generation, source.status, source.credential_user_id, source.trace_id, source.last_error, source.initialized_at, source.created_at, source.updated_at )

insert into reference_repository_replicas( repository_id, linux_server_id, generation, status, branch, retry_count, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{repositoryId}, #{linuxServerId}, #{generation}, 'PENDING', #{branch}, 0, #{now}, #{now} ) on conflict (repository_id, linux_server_id) do update set generation = excluded.generation, status = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then 'PENDING' else reference_repository_replicas.status end, branch = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then excluded.branch else reference_repository_replicas.branch end, current_commit_hash = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then null else reference_repository_replicas.current_commit_hash end, retry_count = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then 0 else reference_repository_replicas.retry_count end, next_retry_at = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then null else reference_repository_replicas.next_retry_at end, lease_token = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then null else reference_repository_replicas.lease_token end, lease_until = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then null else reference_repository_replicas.lease_until end, last_error = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then null else reference_repository_replicas.last_error end, synced_at = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then null else reference_repository_replicas.synced_at end, updated_at = case when reference_repository_replicas.generation < excluded.generation or (reference_repository_replicas.generation = excluded.generation and reference_repository_replicas.status = 'DEFERRED') then excluded.updated_at else reference_repository_replicas.updated_at end where reference_repository_replicas.generation <= excluded.generation

merge into reference_repository_replicas as target using (values ( #{repositoryId}, #{linuxServerId}, #{generation}, #{branch}, cast(#{now} as timestamp) )) as source(repository_id, linux_server_id, generation, branch, updated_at) on target.repository_id = source.repository_id and target.linux_server_id = source.linux_server_id when matched and target.generation <= source.generation then update set generation = source.generation, status = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then 'PENDING' else target.status end, branch = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then source.branch else target.branch end, current_commit_hash = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then null else target.current_commit_hash end, retry_count = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then 0 else target.retry_count end, next_retry_at = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then null else target.next_retry_at end, lease_token = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then null else target.lease_token end, lease_until = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then null else target.lease_until end, last_error = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then null else target.last_error end, synced_at = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then null else target.synced_at end, updated_at = case when target.generation < source.generation or target.status = 'DEFERRED' then source.updated_at else target.updated_at end when not matched then insert ( repository_id, linux_server_id, generation, status, branch, retry_count, created_at, updated_at ) values ( source.repository_id, source.linux_server_id, source.generation, 'PENDING', source.branch, 0, source.updated_at, source.updated_at )
